headline: Nordson Electronics Solutions Wins the EM China Innovation Award for Best Supplier of the Year
summary: CARLSBAD, Calif., April 12, 2026--Nordson Electronics Solutions receives EM China Innovation award for Best Supplier of the Year in electronics manufacturing.
